Media Updates + December's Prize Draw
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 4th December, 2004 at 11:25 GMT
  
Congratulations to Matt Keeder for winning last month's prize draw....This month you can win the Animatrix dvd, CLICK HERE for more details. Also be sure to check back here a few days before christmas as I'm planning on doing a 'Christmas Special' prize draw......A truly amazing prize will be up for grabs.

As for the media; I've added:
- Naruto Episode 112
- Ghost In The Shell Episode 16
- DBGT Lost Episodes 7-9
New Interview
 

Posted By: Spike
Date: Wednesday 1st December, 2004 at 01:05 GMT
  
I just posted my interview with famed voice actor Joshua Seth. He voiced Tetsuo from "Akira", Hige from "Wolfs Rain", and Tai from "Digimon". Here is a link to the article, enjoy!

Click Here
Media Updates
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Monday 29th November, 2004 at 17:28 GMT
  
Hey, I've added some new media files; recent episode releases and an assortment of movies...Also due to hundreds of requests I have added the funimation release of the dbgt movie special, which is good quality and in english.

Updates:
- Dragonball GT Movie - A Hero's Legacy
- Vampire Hunter D Movie
- Sakura Wars Movie
- Lupin III Movie
- Macross-Do You Beleive In Love Movie
- Bleach Episodes 6-8
- Naruto Episodes 108-111
Premium Memberships
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 27th November, 2004 at 23:00 GMT
  
Hey, the server for premium members has now finished being set up. TO BECOME A PREMIUM MEMBER CLICK HERE, with a premium membership you can download more than file at once, resume downloads, have fast download speeds for less than $7/month. If you purchase a subscription before the end of november it will only cost $5.99/month.
Donators Media
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 24th November, 2004 at 16:12 GMT
  
At long last I have finally got round to creating a donators section (premium membership).....To be released this saturday; those who donate over $6.99 or purchase a premium subscription($6.99) will be granted access to some new special features such as high-speed downloads, ability to download multiple files at once, an ability to resume downloads, etc... Those who sign-up before the end of the month will only have to pay $5.99. More details will be published on saturday(The general release)..
Donations
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Saturday 20th November, 2004 at 23:07 GMT
  
Hey, thanks very much to those who have donated so far this month, I have now updated the donators list. Unfortunately however, we are still about 4 days behind. I would really appreciate it if we could quickly catch up so that we meet our final goal on time at the end of the month. Thanks very much.
New Stuff + Anime Episodes Working
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 12th November, 2004 at 21:34 GMT
  
Hey, all the anime episodes are now fully working and I have also added some new stuff to the site. The competition is going well and so are the donations, if we carry on at this rate we will meet the target at the end of the month. I'll try and respond to the poll as best as possible...I'll be adding some more series to the site each week.

Today's Additions
- Bleach Episodes
- Latest Naruto Episodes
- Tokyo Godfathers Movie
- Detective Conan 1st Movie
- Saiyuki Movie - Requiem

enjoy.
November's Prize Draw
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Sunday 7th November, 2004 at 12:14 GMT
  
Hey, sorry for the delay, I've been really busy trying to sort out the media, I didn't have time to announce the competition. Firstly I would like to congratulate last month's winner; Jason L. Vandenburg who won the ghost in the shell dvd. Second of all; this month's comp....You can win the 'Van Hellsing London Assignment dvd', CLICK HERE for more details.

As for the non-db episodes, I've decided to wait untill friday before I release them along with some new media....so hang tight for a few more days.
Media Back Up
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Friday 5th November, 2004 at 15:37 GMT
  
Hey, all the media is now back up except for the non-db episodes. There are still alot of things to do to to the media server, i.e. connection limiting. If I find anyone opening multiple connections to the server or using a download manager their ip will be blocked. I'll post another update later.
Slight Delay (Won't effect db media)
 

Posted By: jamjar
Date: Wednesday 3rd November, 2004 at 15:12 GMT
  
Hey, thanks very much for the donations last month, and thanks for those which have come in so far this month. This news post is just to notify you that not all the non-dragonball media will not be ready by friday because I had some internet connection problems yestarday, I'm approximately 21 hours behind shedule at the moment. So far I've uploaded all the dragonball stuff and the anime movies, I've only just been able to start uploading the episodes of other animes.
